title: BharatBench RAG question
description: Schema for retrieval-augmented question entries (rag/questions/*.json). Mirrors dataset/schema.json's provenance requirement -- 'source' is required for the same reason: RAG question credibility depends on knowing where a question and its reference answer came from.

category.description: Always 'rag' -- distinguishes this from dataset/schema.json's 5 categories.

reference.description: Ground-truth answer, gradeable the same way dataset/schema.json's reference is (LLM-as-judge).

source.description: Provenance of the question itself (who wrote it, from where). See dataset/schema.json and CONTRIBUTING.md.

relevant_doc_ids.description: IDs (from rag/kb_schema.json documents) that should be retrieved to answer this question correctly. Used to score retrieval quality (did the pipeline actually fetch a relevant doc?), separately from final-answer quality.

placeholder.description: true for scaffolding/example entries only (see rag/knowledge_base/PLACEHOLDER_*.json). Must be absent or false for real questions.
